workflow_runs.name: Deploy to Cloudflare
workflow_runs.display_title: Split Worker (putige-worker) from Pages (putige) for pages.dev URL

head_commit.message:
Split Worker (putige-worker) from Pages (putige) for pages.dev URL

Worker and Pages cannot share the same Cloudflare project name.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

workflow_runs.name: Deploy to Cloudflare
workflow_runs.display_title: Use wrangler-action for Pages production deploy with GitHub token

head_commit.message:
Use wrangler-action for Pages production deploy with GitHub token

Official action sets production deployment correctly for putige.pages.dev.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

workflow_runs.name: Deploy to Cloudflare
workflow_runs.display_title: Fix Pages production deploy by removing preview --branch flag

head_commit.message:
Fix Pages production deploy by removing preview --branch flag

Direct upload to putige.pages.dev must not pass --branch; that only updates preview URLs.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

workflow_runs.name: Deploy to Cloudflare
workflow_runs.display_title: Rename Worker to putige-worker to avoid Pages name conflict

head_commit.message:
Rename Worker to putige-worker to avoid Pages name conflict

Use nodejs_compat_v2 and improve Pages deploy verification in CI.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

workflow_runs.name: Deploy to Cloudflare
workflow_runs.display_title: Fix Pages bundle: include OpenNext worker modules in assets

head_commit.message:
Fix Pages bundle: include OpenNext worker modules in assets

Deploy .open-next/assets with _worker.js and dependencies via wrangler 4 pages deploy.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>
